pages.title: Aarakocra
pages.text: Bird-folk. Small and light. Height 0.92. The flying race — but flight requires equipped wings, and heavy armor grounds you.

pages.title: Icarus Wings
pages.text: Equip wings in the chest slot to fly. Without them you cannot. Iron or netherite chest or leg armor blocks flight until removed — leather, chain, or light fantasy armor only.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Sky-Born.$(/) While flying, fall damage and wall-crash damage do nothing.$(br2)$(bold)Talons.$(/) Bare-hand attacks gain +1 damage.$(br2)$(bold)Dive Attack.$(/) While gliding or falling with wings out, melee damage +100%.$(br2)$(bold)Hollow Bones.$(/) -2 max health (-1 heart).
